scripts.build: next build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');function cpR(s,d){if(!fs.existsSync(s))return;fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=s+'/'+f,dp=d+'/'+f;fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?cpR(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}cpR('public','.next/standalone/public');cpR('.next/static','.next/standalone/.next/static')"
